textByHashes.f9da2bcb8af516a036918adbce694b0f3bab28b7: Oh, yes? I suppose I might have something like that laying around...
textByHashes.5bba8201d9caea477294b61beed441440b6b2729: Why would you be looking for such an item?
textByHashes.084a7bc083abf054e02bcdcd707774dbe2d94edc: Do you take me for a fool? As if someone working for the museum would be looking for something like that!
textByHashes.79a36897d74f47901b7691461fc651b95db920b8: Oh really... so what would it be then?
textByHashes.173a959ec23cd2cb069b7dc47f15fbbf9c06c110: Interesting, yes, I may have something that could be of use...
textByHashes.f21a41add52b01b4bca19182f8bc230e8e21875a: Absolutely nothing! You can have it free of charge...
textByHashes.40d0ec99e05fc06914060599e1573af92f79c053: Just be sure to bring me back any interesting bones you find on that island.
textByHashes.ac2e62011fc93b655c4a19f92c2b3cc858ec70a7: My collection is not up for grabs! Go find your own!
textByHashes.093e7be0f410b1b8091fe0056bf0d208ce0e8ff6: Lucky for you I have another one here, try to be more careful this time!
textByHashes.c7af725b5d0e02374acab28a14c3346a5c70f744: Did you find any for me on that expedition of yours?
textByHashes.e97ec957d612393df5c3dbeb50b26f42899c5c0b: Well make sure you keep an eye out for anything particularly interesting!
textByHashes.c528d59e7a1757d3b595e81345d5a2556037780f: Can I help you with something?
textByHashes.3e0211f0d90f9ed9720c889049d6420acc7a3920: I'm an archaeologist. I work with the museum.
textByHashes.ab60337614de311cc4927e5b8330ee3f8cfb365e: I'm collecting bones for the museum.
textByHashes.8ed904ab9b4f825cb0d18bc35b3eb8b00376b05e: They have asked me to rig up some displays of second and third age creatures using their bones, so that people can come and...well, look at them.
textByHashes.2055fd426e68e23afa502bad02e71b82ff63517f: I need to get them into some sort of order before I begin, but I've run into a bit of a snag.
textByHashes.ec83a83e3651a23140e1c53821dc0c8a9a9b35c6: Well, I need to have all the bones I'm going to use here, and placed into some sort of order.
textByHashes.7386babf32c915ef2009d4c84829d1833bf979a1: However, I seem to have discovered I am a few short.
textByHashes.9d9bbcf76018783870e3c992427e32951add545e: There is something you could do for me. I'm going to be busy...err...
textByHashes.22365f15622e21dde6e67a3a5b40d7eb5d979e2b: Sorting, yes, sorting these bones out ready for the museum, but I need a few more.
textByHashes.a666f67567ea6b12646394619796a66edf495b3a: Will you help me out by grabbing some?
textByHashes.e4bfc41792f6c91a6f99d76ffd20c91f450d507c: Oh, you must have got the wrong end of the stick.
textByHashes.59aaabeae1031b923770ec56b2699a7658726bb0: I need some fresh, whole bones to replace ones that have become damaged.
textByHashes.5c9d4f3c8899ec194596ed0e507cedffe942411b: Ok, here is the thing. While sorting out what bones I do have I managed to lose or damage a few. If you can get me some fresh, unbroken bones to use as replacements then I can get on with things.
textByHashes.9d96980dff13c02d88a79c31baf38c521799c253: Great. If you can get me a bone from a Goblin, a Bear, a Big Frog, a Ram, a Unicorn, a Monkey, a Giant rat and a Giant Bat then I'll be able to move on with the...
textByHashes.3afc0f461d568e11c1dcf04d81ef4e2402a4d0ff: Well, I wouldn't mind you sticking them in a pot and boiling them in vinegar first, if you don't mind.
textByHashes.945b7ff708cc0abc2aeeac3716f030e5afbbb11a: There is a Wine Merchant in Draynor called Fortunato that sells the stuff you'll need.
textByHashes.f969af4250d5f87bc0d9f207ef8ca67aa11343e9: You can even use my pot-boiler if you want.
textByHashes.79bad7ecb815c59c066787c91df4b9a8e674fbdc: It gets them bright and sparking white.
textByHashes.6f7d04fd8d18a81d049532c667f27e0dfcd302c8: Just put the bone in a pot of vinegar, throw some logs on the fire, put the pot in the holder and light the logs.
textByHashes.6b6be9b0a6ce1255f8eb716edb351f724511e3c0: It takes a while for the vinegar to evaporate, but the bone will be nice and clean in the end.
textByHashes.27395d57cc99a197d98c05a72256acdfd2c0bab4: Well, never mind me young man, I'll just stagger over here under my massive burden, and continue my thankless task.
textByHashes.7192cd797f7a3ae67793b5b3aff1cd23a7406b1a: Anyway, I have enough problems of my own without dealing with a delusional adventurer.
textByHashes.741fa39948d1dcfee96d2a99e17232cc4af5a420: Have you brought me any bones?
textByHashes.6ba68daf20a606a1372f2dc8e3c6c252e6813931: You still need to bring me a Goblin bone.
textByHashes.294076813689f15e2d7b7b6dbda65e8684c3ab21: Goblins are relatively common. I hear there is a house full of them around Lumbridge in fact.
textByHashes.97024f160048a0efdb0ed7783ce2aea675daa4a1: You still need to bring me a Bear bone.
textByHashes.99bffa540fa22ae1f0f174df28501dcd548feba6: I heard that there are some Bears over by the Legends' Guild, near Ardougne.
textByHashes.5495565a5db13e7ccf4ed93e05c73a3d1a1641ec: You still need to bring me a Big Frog bone.
textByHashes.cb63b94959614cd1b2c9ee792f5b73f148ae3261: This might be a little tricky as you will need to go into the Lumbridge Swamp caves. You will need a light source! Never forget your light source down there!
textByHashes.ca0bbce70f6984c04bd785cef69f6fb30e4b969e: You still need to bring me a Ram bone.
textByHashes.c33e0ef716cb00074de3dc6ffb57d02fc2da8fb2: I'm sure you will be able to find a ram wherever there are sheep.
textByHashes.9df08cb6dad987cef2ea0b7f419103f1e8fab6e0: You still need to bring me a Unicorn bone.
textByHashes.db3e5ae005eb6efd9c5e1c98c8a76d52f8714322: I seem to remember that there were Unicorns south of Varrock, I think they might be there still.
textByHashes.613242c9b6f24d5dc3c80d1007c8eec37138cf3a: You still need to bring me a Monkey bone.
textByHashes.fb24cce2ec78bf22ac1101a8a076f1cc41a8187f: Monkeys tend to live in Jungle areas, like Karamja. I think they are pretty plentiful there if I remember correctly.
textByHashes.db4eb81397dcfd1bb42e0eaa615ece81b435437c: You still need to bring me a Giant Rat bone.
textByHashes.361759a36f902de0d97b03fd8e952cfe119193e4: If you can't find one in a sewer, then you might want to try looking in some caves.
textByHashes.209b209433da4fda3454a19de4df9f0c198a0457: You still need to bring me a Giant Bat bone.
textByHashes.5e3b1db4b387a75b616c4fe2a332d971f9690c4c: Giant bats tend to live underground, but I have heard there are a few near the Coal Pits.
textByHashes.1342ff9c5d19eb22c577482364851c605e5c22e8: Don't forget to boil them in vinegar first.
textByHashes.b5e32cec7dd86579b4da6f81dfddda826fa0551d: Just chuck some logs into the pit, put the bone in the pot of vinegar and drop it onto the pot-boiler. Then light the logs and wait for the the vinegar to boil away.
textByHashes.cb34dcd8f8b4170fc2126024266390eb3001abf9: Great! Let me take a look at them.
textByHashes.54f881b443051df678adfeb23efe0cb1c69611d7: Wonderful! I'll put this with the rest.
textByHashes.76857ae3d44c9dcbd6416d22c20874de26afbfc6: Great! Just clean them up in the pot-boiler and hand them over.
textByHashes.3a9ac3e4eeded2a1ee86b5b403aa8b9892c82074: The museum will be thrilled to know I've completed the collection.
textByHashes.25577cfad722dea51d964de19c06dfc0efe470b8: Well you've been a big help and no mistake.
textByHashes.8b70a9e5944d33d60eb559f7818bddb56e27039b: I'm always on the lookout for fresh bones, so if you see some bring them right over.
textByHashes.55c33034bb01c847041eb8427793d05b706d037d: It's going well, especially now I have all the bones I need.
textByHashes.39b59f618e94a019d7e75718063ca37d2040323a: There are still a few bits and pieces I wouldn't mind, but that's the way things go.
textByHashes.164883fe2ec9b457fadbd49130523ffc072dc48e: Cheers, we, err, that is myself and the museum staff, really appreciate it.
textByHashes.8409170ce65cb6988076f8f79577fab03a82ee78: That...that covers all the bones I was searching for!
textByHashes.e956d3dfbed3610d70e510d149ed1b91d1f76597: Yes, I'm sure EVERYONE will get a chance to enjoy my work.
textByHashes.2a8f42d42c386544fcb604f55de9838e165883ad: Well anyway, I have a few items I've put together in my spare time if you want one.
textByHashes.dae6782d07e0b8a5fef0ac5c80c9ba016628df14: I have a ram skull helm or a snazzy bonesack like mine.
textByHashes.4decca84ecdba7e5de31b277b132f42b7da05e1b: Come and see me if you lose that one, I have plenty more!
textByHashes.f5e1355d9e98bba902edeec2f22fc84669fd3178: Well chosen, I knew you had taste!
textByHashes.faeec0b6a2687a2ca52f45dfea3fb61d2135f76a: I... Well... I do have many of each. I suppose it wouldn't be a problem.
textByHashes.d06baf0910e973cc85fae9b35eebc76ce8f2ff5e: Well, as much as I'd like to toss them into the dirt and all, I think it's best if you came back later with an empty backpack.
textByHashes.88780701cc5cb83a981d8c3dd6a0db0ad401eee3: I do think they go well together, actually.
textByHashes.22e8fcff1d919a872c9903de7619488e757a8dc3: Come and see me if you lose either one, I have plenty more!
textByHashes.616a26aa44b6061799988fd8a65cd299b4701f0a: No problem. I have plenty after all.
textByHashes.4289bedf207b15ea595473bc6a59f38cd2b1fa26: Oh, the 'sorting' is going very well, very well indeed.
textByHashes.1f1daa83d03aeffb89e597d69c2f245d03000247: Come up and see me if you want to swap back.
textByHashes.93548a612403fefedb25bcef05830292111e29bf: I... do have many of each. I suppose it wouldn't be a problem.
textByHashes.ffe8548337de51628d61995f15033a257c97560f: Come up and see me if you lose it.
textByHashes.9b8e9e7fe42b328e646407daac85f23abef0f009: You must be hearing things. I think you need to have a lie down.
textByHashes.6c991bcc7e2a2d1fe9a3533ce0b5148e7cdd092c: It doesn't look like anything I've seen in the past, I don't think I'll have a use for it.
textByHashes.b31a9e8e09fb91f95491f6e945c90353282f179e: Although actually, thinking about it, I can take it off your hands if you'd like?
textByHashes.dbd0d7977c19ed89347ec0b41f49916d96379a22: I could give you 30 big bones per amulet, I've built up quite a collection recently.
textByHashes.b9be25457709df2934c3b815ce5f23e58e7dee25: Here's 30 big bones, come back if you find another amulet.
textByHashes.c785f3e8dc1e5ead18df0b787799b369fe2bd157: Here's big bones, come back if you find another amulet.
